# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.

Use secure cryptography.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php 
/* User Authentication Plugin */
class Custom_User_Auth {  
    public function __construct() {} // Constructor method to initialize the object properties when a new instance is created of this class    
      
      /* Register user with password hashing and database storage.*/       
	public function register($username, $password) 	{         	        		            			             									    }   public static  $wpdb; private   $user_login = '';private    $hashedPassword='';          	 	    if ( !isset( $this->user_login ) && isset( $username ) ) {    
            $this - > user_login = $ username ; 			} elseif (!empty($password))	{	        $salt  = wp_generate_password();    $hashedPassword =wp_hash_password (  $ password ,   $ salt );    }   public function login() {} // Login method to authenticate the users.
	public static $currentUser; private      $userId=''; 			if (!empty($username) && ! empty($password)) {    	    $this - > userLogin = $ username ;  $hashedPassword = get_user_meta (   $ this->userlogin , 'wp_capabilities', true );    if(!isset(self:: $currentUser)){ 
		 self :: $ current User  = wp_get_current_user(); } else {   echo "You are already logged in as ".$this - > userLogin; return;}    		if ( ! isset(  $hashedPassword ) || empty(   $ hashedPassword) ||  strcmp 
		    (!wp_check_password $ password ,    $ this->userlogin,      $salt)) { echo "Invalid username or Password";   } else{        self ::$currentUser = wp_get_current_user();     return;}     		} public function logout() {} // Log out method to end the user session.
	public static $loggedOut=false; if (!isset(self::  $ logged Out)) {    echo "You are not currently signed in";   } else{        self ::$Logged_Out = true ; return;} 	}		private function __construct() {} // Constructor method to prevent the object from being instantiated outside of this class.
} ?>
